title: Talking Tables Pack of 20 White & Gold Paper Napkins Elegant Decorations Wedding Hen Party Christmas Birthday Celebrations, Gold NPKIN PK20
features: Pack of 20 White & Gold Paper Napkins by Talking Tables. Elegant Party Decorations Wedding Hen Party Christmas Birthday Celebrations
SIZE - 33cm x 33cm. Each pack of napkins contains 20 gold serviettes in a damask pattern

OCCASION – The perfect gold napkins for a classy birthday party, dinner party, engagement party, Christmas table, celebration, anniversary or even a wedding. Why not get creative and use these paper napkins for decoupage! Our elegant designs allow you to easily re-create a sophisticated tea party or afternoon tea in your home, garden or even in the park!
MIX & MATCH – To complete the look we also stock paper plates, cups and a whole range of other items in the same design. These can be found in our Amazon store and complete the party theme.

PLANET FRIENDLY – Talking Tables is committed to sustainable practices and protecting the environment. We develop our own products and work with like-minded suppliers to ensure planet-friendly procedures; from the materials we use, the production process and removing plastic from packaging. We continue on our journey to proactively update our product and production methods to reduce our impact on earth.
QUALITY - Our products are designed with quality in mind and are strong, sturdy and made with care.

ABOUT TALKING TABLES - We inspire the world to gather, to be together and to connect with one another. All humans, in all countries, across all time, need to gather. We inspire people to have great gatherings by providing great quality, beautifully designed and fun products that always get the table talking. We give them the creative choices to put the fun in and take the stress out, because time together is the best of times and is the human glue and love of hosts around the world.
description: Product Description Create that unmistakable feeling of Christmas togetherness with Talking Tables. Our festive tableware, candles, and garlands bring warmth and charm to every setting — transforming your dining room into a space that feels alive with laughter and love. From rustic napkins to holly-detailed crackers, every piece is designed to help you set a table that tells a story — one of family, comfort, and unforgettable moments shared around the table. Celebrate friendship, food, and laughter with Talking Tables. Our vibrant tableware, candles, and party crowns turn any meal into a moment worth remembering. Mix bold colours and playful touches for a festive setup that feels spontaneous, stylish, and full of joy. Whether it’s Friendsmas or just a reason to gather, Talking Tables helps you create a table that sparks laughter, connection, and stories that last long after the glasses are empty. Discover our wide collection of products to get your Table Talking Christmas Napkins Add To Basket Christmas Crackers Add To Basket Family Games Night Add To Basket Pet Bandana Add To Basket Light Up Necklace Add To Basket Card Making Craft Kit Add To Basket 100 x Paper Chains Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 25 5.0 out of 5 stars 9 4.3 out of 5 stars 78 — 4.0 out of 5 stars 185 4.4 out of 5 stars 125 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £19.35 £ 19 . 35 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £12.00 £ 12 . 00 £6.75 £ 6 . 75 £7.00 £ 7 . 00 — Giftable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Quality ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ British Brand ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ BCORP Certified ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Family Owned ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
